overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a snowy New York City street at night. The scene features urban architecture with brick buildings, neon signage, moderate traffic with yellow taxis, and pedestrians on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk at night

events.description: Spider-Man begins walking across the crosswalk from standing position
pedestrian gestures toward Spider-Man while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks across the zebra crossing, moving from sidewalk to sidewalk through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in dark jacket gestures with hand while walking past Spider-Man

entered.detail: classic yellow NYC taxi cab with illuminated roof light
dark colored sedan waiting at the intersection
tall brick apartment building with multiple windows and fire escapes
illuminated vertical business signs with Asian characters glowing red and white
white painted zebra crossing stripes on asphalt
iconic skyscraper visible in the distance with illuminated spire

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man stands at a snowy city intersection at night, then proceeds to cross the street. Yellow taxis and other vehicles wait at the traffic lights while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The Empire State Building is visible in the distance between the brick buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with storefronts and parked vehicles

events.description: transitions from street crosswalk onto concrete sidewalk
pedestrian raises phone to take photo of Spider-Man

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks steadily along the sidewalk, passing parked garbage truck and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black jacket raises smartphone to take picture as Spider-Man passes

entered.detail: large white sanitation truck parked at the curb with green logo
classic glass and metal telephone booth on the sidewalk
lit shop windows with merchandise displays and red awnings
deciduous trees with orange autumn leaves lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along the concrete sidewalk past a parked garbage truck and a phone booth. A pedestrian takes a photo with their phone as he passes. Storefronts with illuminated windows line the right side while autumn trees line the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with police presence and steam vent

events.description: steps off sidewalk to cross street near police cruiser
waits at red traffic light then continues crossing as cars pass

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses the street near a police car, navigating around vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white police cruiser parked at the corner with flashing lights

entered.detail: green facade building with gold lettering reading Jospey's Pub
white NYPD police car with blue and red lights flashing
steam rising from street vent creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses another street intersection where a police cruiser is parked near Jospey's Pub. Steam rises from a street vent on the right. The character waits at a red light before continuing across the white crosswalk stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with restaurants and shops

events.description: completes street crossing and enters busier sidewalk section
crowd density increases with more pedestrians on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks through a denser crowd of pedestrians on the sidewalk, passing various storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in same direction creating crowd density

entered.detail: storefront with red and white pizza sign and striped awning
blue USPS postal mailbox on the sidewalk
building with green illuminated facade and large windows

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a busier sidewalk section with more pedestrians. He passes a pizza restaurant and a blue mailbox. The crowd density increases with people walking in both directions, and the Empire State Building remains visible ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy New York City street at night, transitioning from a quiet intersection into a bustling pedestrian corridor. It begins with Spider-Man crossing a snowy street amidst waiting yellow taxis and brick buildings, with the Empire State Building looming in the far distance. As he moves onto the concrete sidewalk, the camera passes a parked garbage truck and a phone booth while pedestrians capture photos against a backdrop of illuminated storefronts and autumn trees. The scene then shifts as he crosses another intersection past a parked police cruiser and rising steam from a street vent, pausing briefly at a red light before stepping across the white crosswalk. Finally, the environment opens into a busier section of the city, moving past a pizza restaurant and a blue mailbox through an increasing crowd of people while the distant skyscraper remains a constant landmark ahead.
